response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack expertise with 6+ years of relevant experience, including direct use of the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js) and secondary technologies like Kotlin/Java. His background includes scalable system development, AI-agent infrastructure, and leadership in technical decisions. Key gaps are minimal; his polyglot approach aligns with the role's flexibility needs.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with direct match to required technologies (TypeScript, React, Node.js)
Proven track record in scaling systems and architectural decisions (e.g., micro-services, Kubernetes, AI-agent infrastructure)
Strong problem-solving and collaboration skills with measurable impact (e.g., top 10 Apple TV app, real-time meta data systems)
concerns: Limited evidence of Vitest testing framework usage in listed projects
Primary focus on DLang and Ember.js in some roles may indicate less recent React/Vitest experience
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL in recent projects, though SQL is listed in skills

key_factors.factor: Direct stack match (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js)
